# 1 Oversized Section

This section contains a very large body of text that exceeds the default
token limit and should trigger the recursive fallback chunking strategy.

At vero eos et accusamus et iusto odio dignissimos ducimus qui blanditiis
praesentium voluptatum deleniti atque corrupti quos dolores et quas molestias

# 2 Glossary Entries

## 2.1 Single Entry

**functional safety**: absence of unreasonable risk due to hazards caused by
malfunctioning behaviour of electrical or electronic systems.

## 2.2 Another Entry

**item**: system or combination of systems to which the functional safety
standard is applied.
